body.title: CLOSED: Librarian model selection skill file
body.description:
Create a skill file for tuning Librarian model selection — same pattern as CC's model routing skills. Lets Akien change the Librarian's tier assignments, add new model options, or override for a session without editing source.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/devices/librarian/skills/model_selection.md
**Design rules:** skill file format consistent with CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS skills
**Scope boundary:** skill file only; does not change inference routing code
**Test plan:** doc review; no code tests needed
